resposta:
solution: 
```python
class Solution:
    def hardestWorker(self, n: int, logs: List[List[int]]) -> int:
        max_time = -1
        best_id = n
        prev = 0
        for emp_id, end in logs:
            duration = end - prev
            if duration > max_time:
                max_time = duration
                best_id = emp_id
            elif duration == max_time:
                if emp_id < best_id:
                    best_id = emp_id
            prev = end
        return best_id
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(L) where L = len(logs)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: Single pass through logs, tracking longest task duration and smallest employee id in case of ties. Constant extra space and minimal CPU usage.
